name: Snow Peas with Sesame Seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the water into a saucepan. Bring to a boil and add the snow peas to the pan. Blanch them for 1 minute and then drain.
2. Melt the butter in a nonstick frying pan. Add the sesame seeds and brown them lightly. Add the snow peas, shallots, and pepper. Saute for 1 minute and serve.
